since_last: 56% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.93%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.31% · BTC +0.69% · Gold +1.48% · Nasdaq100 +1.21%. 56% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.93%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.93%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.02%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +10.43%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +10.43%, KLAC +9.99%, LRCX +9.87%, AMAT +9.65%, TER +7.81%. Laggards: AVAV -6.02%, SOUN -4.22%, PLTR -3.99%, CRM -2.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.24% at $150.14
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.24% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
